chunks.outputPreview: The input is a partial code slice containing definitions for targeting logic, attack cadence, and tick-driven combat behavior. Main files identified are Globals/Global.gd (targeting registry and clearing), Globals/Drones.gd and Globals/Frigates.gd (attack cadence and damage exports), entities/unit/Unit.gd (tick-driven debuff/combat statuses), and managers/player/Player_Manager.gd (unit spawning/ticking). Raw review required.

The input contains extensive test code and source snippets for drone combat logic, specifically targeting `entities/drone_flat/drone_flat.gd` as the main file for targeting, attack cadence (via `_core_logic_tick`, `lived_ticks`, `target_tick`), projectile logic (`bullet.gd`, `DEFAULT_STATS['damage']`), and tick-driven behavior. Key systems verified include Shield Duality damage spreading (`tests/.../shield_systems.gd`), tech unlock modifiers for targeting modes (`target_lead_1`, `targetting_*`),
